summary: Frontend-only Islamic Learning App tested successfully. All 5 tabs (Home, Courses, Teachers, Library, About) are functional. Navigation works correctly. All required content is present: 14 courses, 3 teachers, 8 books, Arabic greeting, announcements, stats, and complete About sections. UI follows mobile-first design with Islamic theme (green, white, gold). No backend/API calls as expected for UI-only app.

issues: React Native Web deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow), 'props.pointerEvents' deprecated (use style.pointerEvents), 'Image: style.resizeMode' deprecated (use props.resizeMode). These are non-critical warnings that don't affect functionality but should be addressed for future compatibility.

action_items: Consider updating deprecated React Native Web props (shadow*, pointerEvents, resizeMode) for better future compatibility - LOW PRIORITY
Consider updating expo-linear-gradient from 55.0.13 to ~15.0.8 for best compatibility with installed expo version - LOW PRIORITY
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All React Native components used correctly (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, FlatList)
✓ All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
✓ All text wrapped in Text components
✓ No hardcoded URLs or backend calls (UI-only app as specified)
✓ Proper mobile-first design with appropriate spacing (8pt grid)
✓ Tab navigation implemented correctly with Expo Router
✓ All data properly hardcoded in constants/theme.ts
✓ Islamic theme colors (green #0F3822, gold #D4AF37, white) consistently applied
✓ Touch targets appear adequate for mobile interaction

success_rate.backend: N/A - No backend in this UI-only app

seed_data_creation: N/A - All data is hardcoded in constants/theme.ts as per requirements
context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a UI-only mobile-first Islamic Learning App with no backend. All functionality is working correctly. The app uses Expo Router for tab navigation with 5 tabs. All content (14 courses, 3 teachers, 8 books) is hardcoded in /app/frontend/constants/theme.ts. The app loads successfully at https://expo-audit-hub.preview.emergentagent.com. Only minor deprecation warnings exist which don't affect functionality.
